# Quick Start

Set up the environment, then read the contribution guide.

## Setup

```sh
nvm use
pnpm install
cp .env.example .env.local
```

## Dev Loop

- Run `pnpm dev` to start everything.
- Run `pnpm test --watch` in a second terminal.
- Use `pnpm story` for component-driven development.

## Pull Requests

- Title MUST follow Conventional Commits.
- Description MUST link the tracking issue and include a test plan.
- SHOULD include a screenshot or screencast for UI changes.
